name: Aso Loom Collective
notes: Handwoven aso oke + dyed adire. Great for premium occasionwear and capsules.

name: Kente & Co Weavers
notes: Bold kente patterns with consistent repeat. Small-batch friendly.

name: Nile Sateen Mills
notes: Reliable shirting and structured dresses; smooth finishes for tailoring.

name: Atlas Linen Works
notes: Airy linens for resort and warm climates; muted dye palettes.

name: Sahel Dye Studio
notes: Fast turnaround wax prints; good for statement pieces and drops.

name: Zambezi Silk House
notes: Event and bridal-grade silks; drape-forward options.

name: Cape Knit & Jersey
notes: Basics and elevated loungewear. Consistent GSM, solid colors.

name: Kigali Artisan Prints
notes: Artisanal block prints; great for accessories and limited editions.

name: Coastal Lace Traders
notes: Occasion lace for bridal and couture. Request swatches first.
